final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] CprogH,
	 input [7:0] CprogM,
	 input [7:0] CprogS,
    input [7:0] CcountH,
	 input [7:0] CcountM,
	 input [7:0] CcountS,
    input en,
    input reset,
	 input clock,
    output reg fin
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt)
	begin
	if (reset)fin<=0;
	else if (en)
		begin
		if(CprogH==CcountH&&CprogM==CcountM&&CprogS==CcountS&&(CprogH!=0||CprogM!=0||CprogS!=0))fin<=1;
		else fin<=0;
		end
	end
endmodule
